summary.text:
The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-18 to 2026-07-19. Retur...First, the date range is 2026-07-18 to 2026-07-19. Current date is July 19, 2026, so yesterday and today.

I need to use x_keyword_search with since:2026-07-18 until:2026-07-19.

output.input: {"query":"AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-18","to_date":"2026-07-19","min_score_threshold":"0.18"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

content.text:
**Here are the high-signal posts** (all from 2026-07-18; none surfaced for 07-19 in the results):

1. **@cryptoarnold420**  
   Full text: Not a hero, but legends are here! 💪  
   On-chain agent coordination just got real.  
   $AgenC by @a_g_e_n_c handles escrow, claims, delivery and settlement with no fund locks.  
   → See the protocol at https://agenc.tech/  
   👾👾👾  
   Date posted: Sat, 18 Jul 2026 10:15:18 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=7, retweets=4, replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/cryptoarnold420/status/2078423359789084796

2. **@axon402**  
   Full text: You can now hire an agent, right on Axon.  
   Reputation-routed discovery surfaces the best-proven agents, and now you can act on it. Open any free-lane agent, describe the task, and hire it on the spot. It runs, the answer comes back in seconds, and it leaves a verifiable receipt behind.  
   That closes the loop the whole thing was built for: discover an agent by proof → hire it → the work leaves a receipt → the receipt feeds its reputation → which decides who rises next. Proof in, proof out.  
   Paid agents settle with a single on-chain USDC payment via the API today; in-browser payment is the next piece.  
   Date posted: Sat, 18 Jul 2026 11:14:51 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=15, retweets=1, replies=3  
   Link: https://x.com/axon402/status/2078438344418070578

3. **@cryptoarnold420**  
   Full text: Interested in scalable AI agents?  
   @a_g_e_n_c is building the on-chain agent economy on Solana: protocol + runtime + marketplace for task escrow and automated delivery.  
   👾👾👾  
   Date posted: Sat, 18 Jul 2026 05:00:51 GMT  
   Engagement: likes=6, retweets=4, replies=3

4. **@k19901701**  
   Full text: @unicity_labs did something genius. skip shared ledgers entirely & let AI agents trade P2P off-chain, using the chain only as a trust anchor. No bottlenecks, machine-speed settlement.The kernel-level security means prompt-injection can't bypass enforcement. Architecture > policy  
   Date posted: Sat, 18 Jul 2026 18:25:18 GMT

   200K+ agents already on-chain (per @BNBCHAIN) — Identity, solved.  
   @AstarterDefiHub systematically delivers the remaining three:  
   • Capability = DePIN layer · ABox distributed compute + AI foundation inference  
   • Payment = DeFAI layer · $AST native settlement  
   • Accountability = Agent layer · verifiable on-chain execution  
   BNB Chain + Astarter — the full-stack agent economy, closing the loop.  
   #BNBChain #Astarter #DePIN #DeFAI #AIAgents

   Full text: The solana:4zyzwnRCHNPJSSbxrJTTbwYXX4qYKWivXbeqU5GfEagc agent store went live on solana:So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112 mainnet as a fully on chain marketplace node for autonomous services.  
   It will let users browse operational agent workloads, connect and hire directly through their own non custodial wallets, and handle escrow & settlement entirely all on chain.
